situation_summary: Three department heads left simultaneously in Q3 restructuring. New team inherited platform with zero training. DAU crashed from 38 to 11. Health score fell to 44. COO gave 60-day ultimatum.
action_taken: Emergency re-onboarding: 2-hour live hands-on session with all new team leads. Session recorded and edited into 6 short training videos. Written guides for all core features. HubSpot integration configured live during session.
outcome: DAU recovered to 43 in 8 weeks. Renewed on schedule with 8-seat expansion ($12K). COO became vocal internal advocate.
csm_notes: Do not send documentation when all champions have left — run live sessions immediately. Record everything. New users need to experience quick wins in the first session. Building HubSpot integration live during the session was the wow moment that changed the tone.
